title: hieracium levicaule subsp. membranulatum
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. membranulatum, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Hieracium levicaule subsp. membranulatum can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
